_comment: The unified agent-collab package is the only generated package. Identity and reviewer family are resolved at runtime. Command substitutions are bare commands; specs own Markdown and prose.

agent-collab.tier_pro_resolves_to: the strongest eligible independent reviewer allowed by central policy
agent-collab.tier_flash_resolves_to: the fastest eligible independent reviewer allowed by central policy
agent-collab.tier_pro_resolves_to_claude: an asynchronous Anthropic inbox review; never a synchronous invocation
agent-collab.tier_flash_resolves_to_claude: an asynchronous Anthropic inbox review; never a synchronous invocation
agent-collab.tier_pro_resolves_to_gemini: an eligible managed Google-family reviewer at high effort
agent-collab.tier_flash_resolves_to_gemini: an eligible managed Google-family reviewer at low effort
agent-collab.merge_resolve_call_params: `effort='high'` in every eligible advisory row and no `tier` request field
agent-collab.brainstorm_call_params: with `effort='low'` in every eligible advisory row and no `tier` request field
agent-collab.code_review_call_params: `effort='high'` in every eligible advisory row and no `tier` request field
agent-collab.debate_call_params: `effort='high'` in every eligible advisory row and no `tier` request field
agent-collab.debate_call_params_short: `effort='high'` in every eligible advisory row and no `tier` request field
agent-collab.logic_check_call_params: `effort='xhigh'` in every eligible advisory row and no `tier` request field
agent-collab.long_context_call_params: with the exact documented huge-context row and no `tier` request field
agent-collab.qa_verify_call_params: `effort='low'` in every eligible advisory row and no `tier` request field
agent-collab.qa_verify_call_note: the skill default; raise effort only for subtle correctness constraints
agent-collab.red_team_call_params: `effort='high'` in every eligible advisory row and no `tier` request field
agent-collab.second_opinion_call_params: `effort='high'` in every eligible advisory row and no `tier` request field
agent-collab.simulate_user_call_params: with `effort='low'` in every eligible advisory row and no `tier` request field
agent-collab.simulate_user_call_note: the skill default; raise effort for nuanced personas
agent-collab.ui_to_code_call_params: with no managed image route in this release
agent-collab.visual_review_call_params: with no managed image route in this release
